name: Seated Piriformis Stretch
description: Sit in a chair or on the floor with legs extended. Cross one ankle over the opposite knee. Sit tall and gently lean forward from the hips, keeping your back straight. You should feel a deep stretch in the outer hip and glute of the crossed leg. For a deeper stretch, gently press down on the crossed knee. Hold, then switch sides. Targets the piriformis muscle which can contribute to sciatic discomfort when tight.
